records.question: Which wrestlers named El Samurai had exactly 1 reign lasting exactly 1 day at a Live event?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT wrestler.wrestler_id FROM wrestler
WHERE wrestler.reign = '1' AND wrestler.days_held = '1' AND wrestler.name = 'El Samurai' AND wrestler.event = 'Live event'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT wrestler.wrestler_id
FROM wrestler
JOIN elimination ON wrestler.wrestler_id = elimination.wrestler_id
WHERE wrestler.name = 'El Samurai'
AND wrestler.reign = '1'
AND wrestler.days_held = '1'
AND wrestler.event = 'Live'

records.question: Which wrestlers have exactly 1 reign?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT wrestler.wrestler_id FROM wrestler
WHERE wrestler.reign = '1'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT wrestler.wrestler_id
FROM wrestler
JOIN elimination ON wrestler.wrestler_id = elimination.wrestler_id
GROUP BY wrestler.wrestler_id
HAVING COUNT(elimination.elimination_id) = 1

records.question: Which wrestlers named Rey Misterio Sr. had their first reign lasting exactly 344 days at a live event held in locations containing Tijuana?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT wrestler.wrestler_id FROM wrestler
WHERE wrestler.days_held = '344' AND wrestler.event = 'Live event' AND wrestler.name = 'Rey Misterio Sr.' AND wrestler.reign = '1' AND wrestler.location LIKE '%Tijuana%'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT wrestler.wrestler_id
FROM wrestler
JOIN elimination ON wrestler.wrestler_id = elimination.wrestler_id
WHERE wrestler.name = 'Rey Misterio Sr.' AND wrestler.days_held = '344' AND wrestler.location LIKE '%Tijuana%' AND elimination.time = (SELECT MIN(time) FROM elimination WHERE wrestler_id = wrestler.wrestler_id)

records.question: Which wrestlers named El Samurai § have exactly 2 reigns and are located in places containing Sapporo?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT wrestler.wrestler_id FROM wrestler
WHERE wrestler.location LIKE '%Sapporo%' AND wrestler.name = 'El Samurai §' AND wrestler.reign = '2'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT wrestler.wrestler_id
FROM wrestler
JOIN (
    SELECT Wrestler_ID
    FROM wrestler
    WHERE Name = 'El Samurai §'
    GROUP BY Wrestler_ID
    HAVING COUNT(Reign) = 2
) AS valid_wrestlers ON wrestler.Wrestler_ID = valid_wrestlers.Wrestler_ID
WHERE Location LIKE '%Sapporo%'
